title: hieracium eurybasis
intro: Hieracium eurybasis, also known as Hawkweed or Hieracium, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Hieracium eurybasis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Hieracium eurybasis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
